title: Just Enough Building Blocks
description: Adds a variety of different building blocks. Vertical slabs, and more.
body:
## For anybody downloading it. Please do this [Survey](https://forms.office.com/r/LPyqWi70ak), It will help a lot.


# JEBB: More Blocks, More Possibilities


Tired of the same bulky cubes limiting your creativity? Just Enough Building Blocks is a lightweight, vanilla-plus mod dedicated to giving you the precise shapes you have always wanted. We focus on the micro-details that turn a simple house into a masterpiece. Instead of reinventing the wheel, this mod fills the gaps in Minecraft’s block palette with a handful of new shapes that look and feel completely native.

---

## Key Features

### Vertical Slabs

![Vertical Slabs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f6ee39380eb08d419f27fa805f60c8e26edc1ff3.png)



### Quarter Blocks (1/4 Slabs)

![q blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7b453b8da47cd416d99eedc5c8777f980c916601.png)
